CommandLine.Parameter: "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\4PPC70_0573_20B\ashwac.br" -L "Acp10_MC: V5.30.2, Acp10man: V5.30.2, Acp10par: V5.30.2, Acp10sdc: V5.30.2, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, astime: V*, brsystem: V*, Library: V*, NcGlobal: V5.30.2, operator: V*, runtime: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*, Timer: V*" -c "Config1" -Z "Acp10Arnc0: 5.30.2, mappView: 5.16.1, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, AAS: n.d" -M IA32 -B R4.93 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1" -T SG4
